title: Rush Hour API
subtitle: Traffic surges are causing police report timeouts
objective: Choose and connect components that absorb spikes while keeping the request path stable.
constraints: Avoid single bottlenecks in request routing
Connect components in the intended traffic flow

concepts.title: Traffic Distribution
concepts.description: Use a load balancer in front of API services.

concepts.title: Read Acceleration
concepts.description: Add a cache or CDN to reduce API pressure on repeated reads.

concepts.title: Persistent Source of Truth
concepts.description: Persist requests through API into durable storage.
